LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, OCT-22-2020 HEARING HELD RE: MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES, OR ALTERNATIVELY, FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION FROM DEFENDANTS LAYERS, LLC AND PATXIS OPCO, LLC. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH A MODIFICATION, AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IS ADOPTED WITH THE FOLLOWING EXCEPTION: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO RFP 36, 37, 38, AND 40. THE COURT IS NOT CONVINCED DEFENDANTS HAVE MADE A REASONABLE AND DILIGENT SEARCH FOR RECORDS, AND WILL REQUIRE DEFENDANTS TO CONDUCT A REASONABLE AND DILIGENT SEARCH WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THE COURT'S ORDER. DEFENDANTS ARE TO SERVE CODE COMPLAINT RESPONSES ON PLAINTIFFS AND DETAIL THE STEPS AS TO HOW DEFENDANTS HAVE MADE A REASONABLE AND DILIGENT SEARCH. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS FROM DEFENDANTS LAYERS, LLC AND PATXI'S OPCO, LLC IS OTHERWISE GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART AS SET FORTH IN THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION. BOTH PARTIES' REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE AND EMAIL A PROPOSED ORDER TO DEFENSE COUNSEL FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM, AND THEN EMAIL THAT PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT TODAY AT CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, Or Alternatively, Further Discovery Responses And Production From Defendants Layers, Llc And Patxis Opco, Llc (Jpt Wohl Recusal On 10/1/20)
Off Calendar Oct-22-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOHN A. LOFTON, Esq. of Aiman-Smith & Marcy, P.C. (Tel: 510-817-2711) of the plaintiffs;
Atty. DREW SCHAFFER, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, P.C. (Tel: 949-705-3000) for Defendants Layers, LLC, Karpreilly, LLC, and Patxi's Opco, LLC;
Atty. SAMANTHA SQUILLANTE, Esq. of O'Hagan Meyer, LLP (Tel: 213-306-1610) for Defendant Patxi's Limited.

Hearing Re: Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, Or Alternatively, Further Discovery Responses And Production From Defendants Layers, LLC And Patxis Opco, LLC.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification, and rules as follows: The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted with the following exception: Plaintiffs' motion is granted as to RFP 36, 37, 38, and 40. The Court is not convinced defendants have made a reasonable and diligent search for records, and will require defendants to conduct a reasonable and diligent search within 10 days of the court's order. Defendants are to serve code complaint responses on plaintiffs and detail the steps as to how defendants have made a reasonable and diligent search. Plaintiffs' motion to compel discovery responses and production of documents from Defendants Layers, LLC and Patxi's Opco, LLC is otherwise granted in part and denied in part as set forth in the report and recommendation. Both parties' requests for sanctions are denied.

Plaintiffs' counsel is to prepare and email a proposed order to defense counsel for approval as to form, and then email that proposed order to the court today at contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
